user_query: Last week we outlined Phase 2 for the Nimbus rollout. I need you to continue where we left off: recover the "Phase 2: Pilot" tasks and turn them into an actionable checklist. Read the JSONL transcripts under input/sessions/ to rebuild the context. Write the checklist to output/nimbus_checklist.md and write a context trace to output/context_sources.json that indicates which session file contained the Phase 2 details. The checklist must include each task with its Owner and Due date from the transcript.
